entries.source: identify a common mistake;
entries.value: identify caadi ah qalad;

entries.source: Identify gaps, ask clarifying questions, rebuild the explanation, and retry.
entries.value: Identify gaps, weydii clarifying su'aalo, rebuild sharaxaad, iyo retry.

entries.source: Identify the school goals that matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, or enrichment.
entries.value: Identify dugsi yoolal taas matter most: conceptual support, homework tilmaamo, diyaarinta imtixaanka, xasuusin firfircoon, qoraal jawaab-celin, ama enrichment.

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: haddii card keeps failing, do ma only repeat taas. weydii sababta taas waa adag. isticmaal Waxbarid Socratic ah si uncover faham-qaldan, Tababaraha Tallaabooyinka Xisaabta loogu talagalay procedural gaps, ama AI waxbarasho prompt maktabad si find ka fiican study prompt.

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: haddii jawaab waa yes, AI helped aad study. haddii jawaab waa no, xiga move waa ma badan akhris. taas waa active tababar. fur Baro Wax Kasta, Waxbarid Socratic ah, ama AI waxbarasho prompt maktabad iyo u beddel mawduuc u rogo task aad hayso si attempt.

entries.source: If the learner gives a vague request, suggest 3 to 5 people with reasons, best modes, controversy level, and evidence quality. If a person is named but the time slice is missing, offer meaningful versions of that person before any in-character dialogue. Once person and time slice are clear, build the room and dossier before the person speaks.
entries.value: haddii arday siiyaa vague request, suggest 3 si 5 dad leh reasons, ugu fiican qaabab, controversy heer, iyo tayada caddeynta. haddii qof waa named laakiin waqti slice waa missing, bixi meaningful versions ee taas qof ka hor kasta gudaha-character dialogue. Once qof iyo waqti slice waa cad, dhis room iyo dossier ka hor qof speaks.

entries.source: If the learner's intent is vague, resolve it into 3 concrete arrival options and stop for a choice. If the passport is already clear, open the world with modular cards rather than a paragraph.
entries.value: haddii arday's intent waa vague, resolve taas u rogo 3 concrete arrival options iyo stop loogu talagalay choice. haddii passport waa already cad, fur adduun leh modular cards rather ka badan faqradda.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: haddii response feels too broad, narrow taas. weydii loogu talagalay hal tusaale, hal faham-qaldan, hal hubi su'aal, ama hal tallaabada xigta. haddii taas feels too easy, weydii loogu talagalay challenge. haddii taas feels too adag, weydii loogu talagalay bridge ka yimid waxa aad already know.

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: haddii work waa homework, bilow gudaha Tababaraha Shaqo-guriga. haddii taas waa xisaab, isticmaal Tababaraha Tallaabooyinka Xisaabta iyo weydii taas si hubi hal step ee waqti. haddii aad waa trying si understand fikrad deeply, isticmaal Waxbarid Socratic ah iyo jawaab su'aalo ka hor weydiinta loogu talagalay soo-koobid.

entries.source: If you are a California resident, you are entitled to learn what data we collect about you, ask to delete your data and not to sell (share) it. To exercise your data protection rights, you can make certain requests and ask us:
entries.value: haddii aad waa California resident, aad waa entitled si baro waxa xog annaga collect ku saabsan aad, weydii si delete kaaga xog iyo ma si sell (share) taas. si exercise kaaga xog protection xuquuq, aad wuu karaa samee certain requests iyo weydii us:

entries.source: If you are a resident of the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, covered by GDPR. We aim to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data. If you wish to be informed what Personal Data we hold about you and if you want it to be removed from our systems, please email us at support@inspir.app If you are a resident of the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, covered by GDPR. We aim to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data. In certain circumstances, you have the following data protection rights:
entries.value: haddii aad waa resident ee European Union (EU) iyo European Economic Area (EEA), aad hayso certain xog protection xuquuq, covered by GDPR. annaga aim si take reasonable tallaabooyin si allow aad si correct, amend, delete, ama limit isticmaal ee kaaga Xogta Shakhsiyeed. haddii aad wish si noqo informed waxa Xogta Shakhsiyeed annaga hold ku saabsan aad iyo haddii aad rabto taas si noqo removed ka yimid keenna systems, please email us ee support@inspir.app haddii aad waa resident ee European Union (EU) iyo European Economic Area (EEA), aad hayso certain xog protection xuquuq, covered by GDPR. annaga aim si take reasonable tallaabooyin si allow aad si correct, amend, delete, ama limit isticmaal ee kaaga Xogta Shakhsiyeed. gudaha certain circumstances, aad hayso following xog protection xuquuq:

entries.source: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us by email: support@inspir.app
entries.value: haddii aad hayso kasta su'aalo ku saabsan tan siyaasadda asturnaanta, please contact us by email: support@inspir.app

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: haddii aad paste homework su'aal iyo koobiye jawaabta kama dambaysta ah, aad waxaa laga yaabaa finish task, laakiin aad hayso ma built skill. haddii aad weydii loogu talagalay tilmaan, sharax kaaga thinking, isbarbar dhig kaaga jawaab, iyo isku day similar problem, AI becomes study lammaane halkii ee shortcut.

entries.source: If you wish to purchase any product or service made available through Service (“Purchase”), you may be asked to supply certain information relevant to your Purchase including but not limited to, your credit or debit card number, the expiration date of your card, your billing address, and your shipping information. You represent and warrant that: (i) you have the legal right to use any card(s) or other payment method(s) in connection with any Purchase; and that (ii) the information you supply to us is true, correct and complete. We may employ the use of third-party services to facilitate payment and the completion of Purchases. By submitting your information, you grant us the right to provide the information to these third parties subject to our Privacy Policy. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel your order at any time for reasons including but not limited to: product or service availability, errors in the description or price of the product or service, error in your order or other reasons. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel your order if fraud or an unauthorized or illegal transaction is suspected; the decision will be ours and cannot be contested.
entries.value: haddii aad wish si purchase kasta badeecad ama adeeg made la heli karo iyada oo loo marayo adeeg (“Purchase”), aad waxaa laga yaabaa noqo asked si saad certain macluumaad relevant si kaaga Purchase including laakiin ma limited si, kaaga credit ama debit card number, expiration date ee kaaga card, kaaga billing address, iyo kaaga shipping macluumaad. aad represent iyo warrant taas: (i) aad hayso legal right si isticmaal kasta card(s) ama other payment method(s) gudaha connection leh kasta Purchase; iyo taas (ii) macluumaad aad saad si us waa true, correct iyo complete. annaga waxaa laga yaabaa employ isticmaal ee dhinac saddexaad adeegyo si facilitate payment iyo completion ee iibsiyo. By submitting kaaga macluumaad, aad grant us right si provide macluumaad si kuwan third parties maaddo si keenna siyaasadda asturnaanta. annaga reserve right si refuse ama cancel kaaga order ee kasta waqti loogu talagalay reasons including laakiin ma limited si: badeecad ama adeeg availability, errors gudaha description ama price ee badeecad ama adeeg, qalad gudaha kaaga order ama other reasons. annaga reserve right si refuse ama cancel kaaga order haddii fraud ama unauthorized ama illegal transaction waa suspected; decision wuu noqo ours iyo cannot noqo contested.

entries.source: In a world where AI is rapidly advancing, it will only be human consciousness and creativity that can survive. Albert Einstein once said, "Creativity is intelligence having fun."
entries.value: gudaha adduun halkee AI waa rapidly advancing, taas wuu only noqo human consciousness iyo hal-abuur taas wuu karaa survive. Albert Einstein once yiri,"hal-abuur waa intelligence having fun."

entries.source: In any way that violates any applicable national or international law or regulation. For the purpose of exploiting, harming, or attempting to exploit or harm minors in any way by exposing them to inappropriate content or otherwise To transmit, or procure the sending of, any advertising or promotional material, including any “junk mail”, “chain letter,” “spam,” or any other similar solicitation. To impersonate or attempt to impersonate Company, a Company employee, another user, or any other person or entity. In any way that infringes upon the rights of others, or in any way is illegal, threatening, fraudulent, or harmful, or in connection with any unlawful, illegal, fraudulent, or harmful purpose or activity. To engage in any other conduct that restricts or inhibits anyone’s use or enjoyment of Service, or which, as determined by us, may harm or offend Company or users of Service or expose them to liability.
entries.value: gudaha kasta way taas violates kasta applicable national ama international sharci ama regulation. loogu talagalay purpose ee exploiting, harming, ama attempting si exploit ama harm minors gudaha kasta way by exposing them si inappropriate nuxur ama otherwise si transmit, ama procure sending ee, kasta advertising ama promotional material, including kasta “junk mail”, “chain letter,” “spam,” ama kasta other similar solicitation. si impersonate ama attempt si impersonate shirkad, shirkad employee, kale user, ama kasta other qof ama entity. gudaha kasta way taas infringes upon xuquuq ee others, ama gudaha kasta way waa illegal, threatening, fraudulent, ama harmful, ama gudaha connection leh kasta unlawful, illegal, fraudulent, ama harmful purpose ama activity. si engage gudaha kasta other conduct taas restricts ama inhibits anyone’s isticmaal ama enjoyment ee adeeg, ama kee, as determined by us, waxaa laga yaabaa harm ama offend shirkad ama users ee adeeg ama expose them si liability.

entries.value: gudaha tan hage

entries.source: Include the question, what you already tried, where you got stuck, and whether you want a hint, a step check, or feedback.
entries.value: Ku dar su’aasha, waxa aad hore u isku dayday, meesha aad ku xayirtay, iyo haddii aad rabto tilmaan, hubin tallaabo, ama jawaab-celin.

entries.source: Include what you know, what you tried, what level you need, and what kind of help you want.
entries.value: ku dar waxa aad know, waxa aad tried, waxa heer aad u baahan, iyo waxa kind ee caawin aad rabto.
